title: YOUPLUS Assurance AG stops new business
text:
Back to Overview
News
YOUPLUS Assurance AG stops new business
YOUPLUS Assurance AG stops new business
16.10.25
•
Supervision and Regulation
YOUPLUS Assurance AG, 9495 Triesen, has decided to cease new business effective October 13, 2025. Existing insurance contracts will be run-off or transferred in an orderly manner.
The FMA is overseeing this process in close coordination with the relevant supervisory authorities in the countries where the insurance company operates, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements and the protection of policyholders.
